name: Brisbane
industries: Olympics-driven infrastructure, resources-sector programs and a growing tech scene define Brisbane's project decade.
intro: Brisbane is building toward a deadline the whole city can see: the 2032 Olympics anchor an infrastructure program — Cross River Rail, venues, transport upgrades — that has made south-east Queensland one of Australia's busiest project markets. The resources sector runs its Queensland capital programs from Brisbane towers, and a growing tech scene rounds out demand. PMP suits the infrastructure and resources world; Scrum credentials the digital side. Our current batches run live online on the IST schedule — 1:30 PM – 10:30 PM Brisbane time, a late finish we flag honestly by holding this page as off-hours. Register interest for APAC-hours batches and you'll hear first. The package holds: live weekend instruction, exam application support, full-length mocks, and trainer access until you pass.

faq.q: What are the class timings in Brisbane?
faq.a: Our current batches follow the Asia schedule: 09:00 AM – 06:00 PM IST, which converts to 01:30 PM – 10:30 PM GMT+10 in Brisbane. You are welcome to join at those hours, or register interest and we will notify you first when batches in your region's hours are scheduled.

faq.q: Is the training online or at a venue in Brisbane?
faq.a: All batches are 100% live online, taught by an instructor over video with interactive exercises — there is no venue to travel to in Brisbane. You need a laptop, a stable connection and a free weekend.

faq.q: Is the certificate different if I attend from Australia?
faq.a: No. The certification is issued by the same global body regardless of where you attend from, and holds identical recognition with employers in Australia and internationally.

faq.q: Can my employer in Brisbane sponsor the course?
faq.a: Yes. We issue invoices suitable for corporate sponsorship and reimbursement, and most employers in Australia accept them under learning and development budgets. Group pricing is available for teams.

meta.title: {course} Training in Brisbane — Live Online Weekend Batches
meta.description: Live online {course} certification training for Brisbane: upcoming weekend batch dates in your local time, salary data with sources, and exam cost.
